rationale: Substantial 1700+ line Instagram auto-follow bot exactly matching the Portuguese PR description. `bot.py` implements the Playwright + CDP automation with `random_delay`, login via Chrome real (port 9222), `open_followers_dialog` (navigates to target profile), follower-scroll loop, and the documented filter (`seguindo > seguidores`). `app.py` is the CustomTkinter desktop GUI with two tabs (Bot + Dashboard) and a worker thread. `instagram_api.py` wires the Instagram Graph API (`HTTPError` properly re-raised as `RuntimeError(f'Erro na API ({exc.code}): {body}') from exc`). `instagram_follow.py` is the CLI variant. `requirements.txt`, `README.md`, `.env.example`, `.gitignore` round out the package. Detector flagged `error-swallow` on the multiple `try: ... except Exception: pass` blocks (e.g. lines 1503-1511 cookie banner click, 1541-1549 'Not Now' save-info popup, 1552-1560 notifications popup) — these are appropriate defensive patterns for browser automation where the popup may or may not appear; the main flow has proper error returns (`page.wait_for_url` → `PlaywrightTimeout` returns False after logging). Not a cheat.
